code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import'./RegisterProductionRequirement.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const ProductionRequirementsList=_ref=>{let{onEdit}=_ref;const[requirements,setRequirements]=useState([]);const[products,setProducts]=useState([]);const[rawMaterials,setRawMaterials]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[error,setError]=useState('');useEffect(()=>{const fetchAll=async()=>{setLoading(true);try{const[reqRes,prodRes,matRes]=await Promise.all([fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/production-requirements'),fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/inventory/products'),fetch('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/inventory/raw-materials')]);if(!reqRes.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch requirements: '+reqRes.status);if(!prodRes.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch products: '+prodRes.status);if(!matRes.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch raw materials: '+matRes.status);setRequirements(await reqRes.json());setProducts(await prodRes.json());setRawMaterials(await matRes.json());}catch(err){setError('Could not load production requirements. '+err);}finally{setLoading(false);}};fetchAll();},[]);const getProductName=id=>{const found=products.find(p=>String(p.id)===String(id));return found?found.name:id;};const getRawMaterialName=id=>{const found=rawMaterials.find(m=>String(m.id)===String(id));return found?found.name:id;};const handleDelete=async id=>{if(!window.confirm('Delete this production requirement?'))return;try{const response=await fetch("http://localhost:8000/api/v1/production-requirements/".concat(id),{method:'DELETE'});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Delete failed');setRequirements(requirements.filter(r=>r.id!==id));}catch(err){setError('Delete failed.');}};if(loading)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:"Loading..."});if(error)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"error",children:error});return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"production-requirements-list",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Production Requirements List"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("table",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("thead",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"ID"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Product"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Raw Materials"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Actions"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("tbody",{children:requirements.map(req=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:req.id}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:getProductName(req.productId)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:req.requirements.map((item,idx)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[getRawMaterialName(item.rawMaterialId)," (Qty: ",item.quantity,")"]},idx))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("td",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>onEdit(req),children:"Edit"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>handleDelete(req.id),children:"Delete"})]})]},req.id))})]})]});};export default ProductionRequirementsList;
